title: Zurn Elkay Competitive Intelligence System
description: AI-powered competitive intelligence platform with 7 specialized agents covering 5 business units, cross-BU synthesis, and orchestrated quarterly workflows.

scenes.title: Zurn Elkay Competitive Intelligence System
scenes.narration: Welcome. Today we're demonstrating Zurn Elkay Competitive Intelligence System for Zurn Elkay Water Solutions. The challenge: CI analysts spend weeks manually gathering data, each BU does CI differently making roll-ups difficult, and coordinated competitor moves across parent companies like Watts are missed.
scenes.subtitle: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions
scenes.challenge: CI analysts spend weeks manually gathering data, each BU does CI differently making roll-ups difficult, and coordinated competitor moves across parent companies like Watts are missed.

scenes.title: Time to Value
scenes.narration: Traditional approaches take 4-6 weeks per quarterly CI cycle. With our AI agent approach, we deliver in hours with automated data gathering and human review.

metrics.agent_approach: hours with automated data gathering and human review

scenes.title: ACT 1: Architecture Overview
scenes.narration: We ask: "Show me how the Zurn Elkay CI system is structured." The zurnelkay_ci_orchestrator_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Show me how the Zurn Elkay CI system is structured.

scenes.title: Single BU Deep Dive — Run Drains quarterly analysis
scenes.narration: Single BU Deep Dive — Run Drains quarterly analysis. We ask: "Run a quarterly competitive intelligence analysis for the Drains business unit." The zurnelkay_drains_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Run a quarterly competitive intelligence analysis for the Drains business unit.

scenes.title: Parent Company Coordination — Check Watts across Drains
scenes.narration: Parent Company Coordination — Check Watts across Drains. We ask: "Check for coordinated moves by Watts Water Technologies across their drain brands." The zurnelkay_drains_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Check for coordinated moves by Watts Water Technologies across their drain brands.

scenes.title: ACT 2: BU Differentiation
scenes.narration: We ask: "Show how each BU agent is specialized. What does the Wilkins agent track for digital innovation?" The zurnelkay_wilkins_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Show how each BU agent is specialized. What does the Wilkins agent track for digital innovation?

scenes.title: Competitor Deep Dive — Analyze Watts in Wilkins category
scenes.narration: Competitor Deep Dive — Analyze Watts in Wilkins category. We ask: "Give me a deep analysis of Watts as a competitor in the Wilkins space." The zurnelkay_wilkins_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Give me a deep analysis of Watts as a competitor in the Wilkins space.

scenes.title: Source Transparency — Drinking Water certifications
scenes.narration: Source Transparency — Drinking Water certifications. We ask: "Show me NSF certification changes in the Drinking Water category with full source attribution." The zurnelkay_drinking_water_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Show me NSF certification changes in the Drinking Water category with full source attribution.

scenes.title: Healthcare Focus — Sinks competitive landscape
scenes.narration: Healthcare Focus — Sinks competitive landscape. We ask: "What healthcare innovations are happening in the Sinks competitive space?" The zurnelkay_sinks_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: What healthcare innovations are happening in the Sinks competitive space?

scenes.title: Platform Competition — Commercial Brass strategic shift
scenes.narration: Platform Competition — Commercial Brass strategic shift. We ask: "What platform launches are happening in Commercial Brass?" The zurnelkay_commercial_brass_ci_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: What platform launches are happening in Commercial Brass?

scenes.title: ACT 3: Enterprise Intelligence
scenes.narration: We ask: "Now show me the cross-BU synthesis — what patterns emerge across all five business units?" The zurnelkay_crossbu_synthesizer_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Now show me the cross-BU synthesis — what patterns emerge across all five business units?

scenes.title: Executive Briefing — CEO-ready output
scenes.narration: Executive Briefing — CEO-ready output. We ask: "Generate the executive briefing for the quarterly strategy review." The zurnelkay_crossbu_synthesizer_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Generate the executive briefing for the quarterly strategy review.

scenes.title: System Management — Orchestrator health check
scenes.narration: System Management — Orchestrator health check. We ask: "Run a system health check on the entire CI agent swarm." The zurnelkay_ci_orchestrator_agent agent processes this request.
scenes.user_message: Run a system health check on the entire CI agent swarm.

scenes.title: Thank You
scenes.narration: That concludes our Zurn Elkay Competitive Intelligence System demonstration. Key takeaway: Purpose-built multi-agent CI system with parent company coordination tracking, confidence calibration, and CEO-ready executive briefings. Thank you for watching.
scenes.subtitle: Purpose-built multi-agent CI system with parent company coordination tracking, confidence calibration, and CEO-ready executive briefings.
